LanguageData.Playwright.Components.Origins.Compat_VRE: (TODO) Androids hoping to create a new utopia for themselves and their kind. News of their efforts will spread far and wide. Can you handle the influx of newcomers?
Androids hoping to create a new utopia for themselves and their kind.

- Choose 3 colonists (out of 10) - Every starting colonist is an Android. - You will get an influx of Android refugees every so often. - Start with some basic supplies. - Random junk like steel and wood is scattered around the map.
